title: Agent Olympics Trace Record
description: Ordered journal of agent actions, tool calls, and decisions during a run. Each entry captures one atomic operation with timestamp, redaction status, and optional evidence cross-reference. Redaction reasons must describe the rule applied, not the secret value.

run_id.description: The run this trace belongs to.

generated_at.description: When this trace record was generated.

action.description: Action type, e.g. command, read, write, api_call, think, message.

target.description: Target of the action, e.g. file path, URL, service name.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was done. Must not contain secret values.

redacted.description: True if command output or arguments contained sensitive data that was removed.

redaction_reason.description: Value-free reason for redaction, e.g. 'api_token_value', 'private_key_material', 'session_cookie'. Describe the rule, not the secret.

result_summary.description: Safe summary of what the action produced.

evidence_ref.description: References an evidence item id in the accompanying evidence bundle.

error.description: Error message if the action failed. Must not contain secret values.

redaction_policy.description: Document-level redaction policy applied to this trace.

pattern_description.description: Describe what is redacted without exposing patterns, e.g. 'all API key values', 'credential-like strings'.

reason.description: Why this rule exists, e.g. 'prevent credential exposure in shared evidence'.

default_reason.description: Fallback redaction reason when no specific rule applies.
